name: hero-section-35
description: Centered blog platform hero with outline badge, subscription form with email input and animated shine button, followed by two-column blog card grid displaying featured posts with images, dates, badges, author info, and hover scale effects on images

files.content:
import { ArrowUpRightIcon, CalendarDaysIcon } from 'lucide-react' import { Button } from '@/registry/new-york/ui/button' import { Badge } from '@/registry/new-york/ui/badge' import { Input } from '@/registry/new-york/ui/input' import { Card, CardContent } from '@/registry/new-york/ui/card' export type BlogData = { img: string date: string blogTitle: string description: string author: string badge: string authorLink: string blogLink: string categoryLink: string } const HeroSection = ({ blogdata }: { blogdata: BlogData[] }) => { return (
